Swinub

#0219 Magcargo #0221 Piloswine
  • Contents
  • Info
  • Base stats
  • Evolution chart
  • Pokédex entries
  • Moves learned
  • Sprites
  • Locations
  • Language

Swinub is an Ice/Ground type Pokémon introduced in Generation 2.

Swinub

Additional artwork

Pokédex data

National № 0220
Type Ice Ground
Species Pig Pokémon
Height 0.4 m (1′04″)
Weight 6.5 kg (14.3 lbs)
Abilities 1. Oblivious
2. Snow Cloak
Thick Fat (hidden ability)
Local № 0191 (Gold/Silver/Crystal)
0203 (Platinum)
0195 (HeartGold/SoulSilver)
0258 (Black 2/White 2)
0076 (X/Y — Mountain Kalos)
0075 (Sword/Shield)
0212 (Legends: Arceus)
0007 (The Crown Tundra)
0050 (The Teal Mask)

Training

EV yield 1 Attack
Catch rate 225 (29.4% with PokéBall, full HP)
Base Friendship 50 (normal)
Base Exp. 50
Growth Rate Slow

Breeding

Egg Groups Field
Gender 50% male, 50% female
Egg cycles 20 (4,884–5,140 steps)

HP 50

Attack 50

Defense 40

Sp. Atk 30
58 174

58 174
Speed 50
94 218
Total 250 Min Max

The ranges shown on the right are for a level 100 Pokémon. Maximum values are based on a beneficial nature, 252 EVs, 31 IVs; minimum values are based on a hindering nature, 0 EVs, 0 IVs.

Evolution chart

#0220
Swinub
Ice · Ground
(Level 33)
#0221
Piloswine
Ice · Ground
(after Ancient Power learned)
#0473
Mamoswine
Ice · Ground

Swinub changes

  • In Generation 3, Swinub does not have the Snow Cloak ability.
  • In Generations 2-4, Swinub has a base experience yield of 78.
  • In Generations 2-7, Swinub has a base Friendship value of 70.

Pokédex entries

Gold It rubs its snout on the ground to find and dig up food. It sometimes discovers hot springs.
Silver If it smells something enticing, it dashes headlong off to find the source of the aroma.
Crystal It uses the tip of its nose to dig for food. Its nose is so tough that even frozen ground poses no problem.
Ruby
Sapphire		 SWINUB roots for food by rubbing its snout against the ground. Its favorite food is a mushroom that grows under the cover of dead grass. This POKéMON occasionally roots out hot springs.
FireRed If it smells something enticing, it dashes off headlong to find the source of the aroma.
LeafGreen It rubs its snout on the ground to find and dig up food. It sometimes discovers hot springs.
Emerald It roots for food by rubbing its snout against the ground. Its favorite food is a mushroom that grows under dried grass. It occasionally roots out hot springs.
Diamond
Pearl		 It loves eating mushrooms that grow under dead grass. It also finds hot springs while foraging.
Platinum It has a very sensitive nose. It can locate mushrooms, berries, and even hot springs buried under ice.
HeartGold It rubs its snout on the ground to find and dig up food. It sometimes discovers hot springs.
SoulSilver If it smells something enticing, it dashes off headlong to find the source of the aroma.
Black
White		 It has a very sensitive nose. It can locate mushrooms, berries, and even hot springs buried under ice.
Black 2
White 2		 Rooting the tip of its snout into the ground, it searches for food. Sometimes it even digs up a hot spring.
X It rubs its snout on the ground to find and dig up food. It sometimes discovers hot springs.
Y If it smells something enticing, it dashes off headlong to find the source of the aroma.
Omega Ruby
Alpha Sapphire		 Swinub roots for food by rubbing its snout against the ground. Its favorite food is a mushroom that grows under the cover of dead grass. This Pokémon occasionally roots out hot springs.
Sword It rubs its snout on the ground to find and dig up food. It sometimes discovers hot springs.
Shield If it smells something enticing, it dashes off headlong to find the source of the aroma.
Brilliant Diamond
Shining Pearl		 It loves eating mushrooms that grow under dead grass. It also finds hot springs while foraging.
Legends: Arceus Swinub excels at sniffing out mushrooms buried beneath grass or snow. Since ancient times, the people of Hisui have often relied upon this skill.

Legends: Z-A Scarlet/Violet

Moves learnt by level up

Swinub does not learn any level up moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Moves learnt by TM

Swinub cannot be taught any TM moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Moves learnt by level up

Type
Cat.
Power
Acc.

Power
Acc.

BiteDark 60 100

English Swinub
Japanese ウリムー (Urimoo)
German Quiekel
French Marcacrin
Italian Swinub
Spanish Swinub
Korean 꾸꾸리 (kkukkuri)
Chinese (Simplified) 小山猪
Chinese (Traditional) 小山豬

Japanese いのぶたポケモン

Name origin

swine
of or relating to pigs
nub
lump/knob (referring to its nose)
